titleStmt.title: SII 38.153: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 153. (A.R. No. 153 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the sixteenth pillar of the verandah, round the central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Begins with the usual meykīrtti of the king, Tirumaṉṉi-vaḷara.

It records a sale of a block 24(1/2) paṭṭi of land (each paṭṭi of land consisting of 1000 kuḻi measured by 12 span rod) after receiving both the price-money and taxmoney by the ūrār of Igaṇaiyūr, a dēvadānam of the Tiruvoṟṟiyūr temple from a lady Sāttan Rāmadēviyār, an aṇukkiyār of the king. It further records that the produce three hundred and sixty kalam of paddy per annum was to be utilized to maintain twelve dēvaraḍiyārs, who were to be paid at the rate of one kuṟuṇi per person per day. It is also stated that the land was sold with irrigation facilities. Further it is mentioned that a piece of land owned by Gōdāvarippiḷḷaiyār amounting to 2000 kuḻi situated within the block granted was excluded from the purview of the land sold.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Iru nilamaṭa(ṉa)n=tayum poṟcayapmāvaiRead pāvai
yum cirttanic celviyun=taṉ perun=teviyarāki Inpuṟa neṭutuyilūḻiyuḷ Iṭai
tuṟai nāṭumntuṭar vaṉavelip paṭarvaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷic cūḻmatiḷ koḷḷippā
kkaiyum naṇṇaṟa karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭalīḻattaraicar muṭiyu
m māṅkavaṉ ṟeviyaroṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavar pakkal teṉṉavaṉ vai
tta cun=taramuṭiyumin=tiranāramu n=teṉṇṭeRead teṇṭiṟaimiḻa maṇṭala muḻuvatumeṟipaṭaik keraḷa
ṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅkulataṉamāniya palar pukaḻmuṭiyuñ ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅ
katir velait tolperuṅkāval palpaḻan=tivum ceruviṟ cinavilirupattoru kālaraicu
kaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ mevaruñ cān=timat tivaraṇ karuti Iruttic cempoṟṟiru taku muṭiyum
payaṅkoṭu paḻi mika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkan Aḷapperum pukaḻoṭum piṭiyil Iraṭṭa
pāṭi Eḻaraiyilakkamum navanitik kulapperumalaikaḷum vikkiravirar cakkarakoṭṭamum mutirvaṭavallai
maturamaṇṭalamum kāmiṭaivaḷaRead kāmiṭaivaḷaināmaṇaikkoṇamum veñcana virapañcappaḷḷiyum pācaṭaippa
ḻaṉa mācuṇitecamum Ayarvil vaṇpūrtti yāti nakaravaiyiṟ cantiraṉ ṟol kulattin=tirarataṉai viḷaiya
mark kaḷattukkiḷaiyoṭum piṭittu palatanattoṭu niṟaikula tanakkuvaiyum kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimiḷaiya Oṭṭa
viṣayamum pūcurar cera nalkkocalai nāṭu tanmapālaṉai vemmuṉaiyaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colait taṇṭa
puttiyu Iraṇacūraṉai muraṇukkaRead muraṇuṟatākkit tikkaṉaikirttit takkaṇalāṭamuṅ kovinn=tacan=tan māviḻin=to
ṭat taṅkātacāral vaṅkāḷatecamu n=toṭu kaṭaṟcaṅkavoṭṭal mahipālaṉai veñcamar viḷākatta
ñcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittilar neṭuṅkaṭaluttira lāṭamum veṟima
lart tirttat teṟipuṉal kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭal naṭuvuḷ pala kalañ celutti caṅkirāmavicaiyottuṅ
kavarmanākiya kaṭārattaraicaṉai vākaiyum porukaṭal kumpakkariyoṭu makappaṭutturimaiyil piṟakkiya perune
tip piṟakkamu mārttavanakar nakarport toḻil vācalil viccātira toraṇamum mottoḷi punamaṇiyputavamuṅ
kanamaṇikkatavum niṟai cirvijaiyamuntuṟai nirppaṇṇaiyum vanmalaiyuraiyiṟ te(o)nmalaiyuru māḻkaṭalaka
ḻcūḻ māyiriṭipaṅkamum kalaṅkāvalviṉai Ilaṅkācokamuṅ kāppuṟu niṟaipunal māppapāḷamuṅ kāvala
m puricai mevilipaṅkamum vaḷaippantūṟuṭai vaḷaippantūṟun=talaittakkor pukaḻ kalait takkolamuṅ
titamar valviṉai mātamaliṅkamum kalātitarkRead kalāmutirkaṭun=tiṟallāmuri tecamu tenakka vārpoḻil mānakkavāramu n=tena
ṭu kaṭaṟ (kāval) kaṭumuraṭ kaṭāramum māpporutaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakesarivarmmarāna Uṭaiyā
r śrīrājendracoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 26vatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu puḻaṟkoṭṭattup puḻa
l nāṭṭu tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār tevatānam Icaṇaiyūrrom nilavilaiyāvaṇak kaiyeḻuttu Uṭai
yār śrīrājendracoḻatevar Aṇukkiyār cāttan Irāmateviyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyārkku kava
rivatamRead kauriviratamtevaraṭiyār 10 2 varkku perāl nicatam poṉ kuṟuṇiyāl Orāṇṭinukku poṉ muṉnūṟṟa
ṟu patin kalattuk nivan=tamāka viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai caṭṭappaṭṭikku meṟkum te
npāṟkellai maṇaliyāna ciṅkaviṇṇuccaruppeti maṅkalattellaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟ ke
llai tevatānaceri melaittulaivāykkup piḷḷaiyār subrahmaṇya devar nilattukku kiḻakkum va
ṭapāṟkellai vāriya vanapputterikaraikku teṟkum Ināṉkellaiyuḷḷum naṭuvu kotā
virippiḷḷaiyār nilam kuḻi Iraṇṭāyiramum niṅkalāka patinaṟucāṇ kolālāyiraṅ kuḻi koṇ
ṭatu paṭṭioṉṟāka Aḷantu viṭṭa nilam paṭṭi Irupattu nālarai Iṉnilattukkuriya nirum niroṭukā
lum tulaiyuntūvāyum Ikaṇaiyūrāṉa kālvaḻi nirkkicain=ta vaṇṇam nirpārccik koḷvatākavu
m vilaipporuḷum Iṟaipporuḷum Ūrārkkoṇṭu vilaiyaṟa viṟṟukkuṭuttom Ikaṇaiyūru
rom .
Digital edition of SII 38.153 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
